name: Bramberger Meat and Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove outer, wilted cabbage leaves and core.
2. Place cabbage in a large pot of boiling water and simmer gently for 10 minutes.
3. Remove and drain the cabbage.
4. Gently pull off 12 leaves and set aside. Finely chop the rest of the cabbage.
5. Heat 1 tbsp vegetable oil; add onions, pork, and ground beef.
6. Cook until lightly browned.
7. Drain off excess fat.
8. Add the chopped cabbage, caraway seeds, salt, and pepper to the pot.
9. Pour in the white wine. Cover and simmer the mixture for 10 minutes, stirring often.
10. Grease an ovenproof dish with 1 tsp vegetable oil.
11. Line the dish with half of the cabbage leaves.
12. Spoon in the meat mixture.
13. Cover with the remaining cabbage leaves.
14. Cut bacon strips in half and arrange on top.
15. Place in a preheated 350°F oven; bake for approximately 45 minutes.
